Metadata.title: NativeSpeechAI — Your AI-Powered Accent Coach
Metadata.description: AI-powered pronunciation coaching that diagnoses why you mispronounce sounds and creates personalized drills to perfect your accent.

Hero.headline: Your accent has a pattern.
Hero.subtitle: AI-powered coaching that diagnoses exactly why you mispronounce sounds based on your native language — then builds personalized drills to fix them.
Hero.demoLabel: Try it now — no account needed

Features.heading: How It Works
Features.subheading: Expert-level accent coaching, available to everyone.
Features.l1l2Desc: We analyze why you mispronounce sounds based on your native language patterns — not just what you got wrong.
Features.drillsDesc: Every exercise targets your specific weak spots with sentences designed to challenge exactly the sounds you struggle with.
Features.trackingDesc: Watch your pronunciation score improve over time with detailed per-phoneme analytics, not vague percentage grades.
Features.multiLangDesc: Starting with English and German, expanding to cover the most demanded language pairs worldwide.

Pricing.title: Pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
Pricing.premiumFeature1: Full AI diagnosis with L1-L2 analysis

About.title: About NativeSpeechAI
About.problemText: Pronunciation coaching is limited to expensive 1-on-1 sessions or generic apps that miss phonetic nuances. Learners receive vague feedback that fails to diagnose accents, regional dialects, or unclear articulation.
About.approachText: We built the first app that diagnoses why you mispronounce sounds based on your native language patterns. Not just what you got wrong — but why, and how to fix it with personalized drills that target your specific weak spots.
About.founderBio: 18 years of software engineering. M.Sc. Informatics. Bachelor in Acting with formal voice training. Multilingual native speaker who has lived the pronunciation challenge firsthand — from Crimea to Germany to building a career in English.
